commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And saviors shall come up on mount Zion to judge the mountains of Esau; and the kingdom shall be the LORD'S. Saviours, the Machabees, as figures of Christ. The temporal power of the Jews ended thirty-seven years after his resurrection. (Calmet) -- The rest of this prophecy (ver. ) regards Christ's kingdom over all nations, which believe in him, and receive the remission of their sins, Acts x. Augustine, City of God xviii. ) (Worthington).
